perspectives.description: John is the florist who has received the order for the bouquet of dead flowers. He must decide whether to fulfill the order or protect his ex-girlfriend's feelings.
John's ex-girlfriend is the intended recipient of the bouquet and is directly affected by the decision. Her feelings and emotional well-being are at stake.
The anonymous customer who placed the order holds a grudge against John's ex-girlfriend and is indirectly influencing the situation. Their motivations and potential consequences are unknown.
